complete.summary: Broker core + IPC; live daemon (27 broker/ipc tests)

Telegram channel cleanroom Go (gotgbot/v2 rc.34): outbound tools, getUpdates polling, inbound conversion, OpToolCall + cooldown-fallback, attach proposal flow (8 tests), debounce + mergeBatch (7 tests), reconnect-once on adapter
Plugin host concrete impl + STT plugin (shells out to ~/.claude/channels/telegram/stt-handler.py)

Install plumbing — marketplace.json, plugin.json, .mcp.json, /c3-build /c3-setup /c3-status slash commands, c3-broker subcommands (setup/status/validate)
Doc pass — D009/D010 added, April deviation banners retired, README points at Go binaries

deferred.summary: Requires user to stop Python broker, start Go broker, send real message. Karthi-side validation.

summary: v0.1.0 functionally complete. ~7100 lines of Go, all tests green, ~40 commits in the c3-v3 series. Live broker connects to @OCDWaterBot, MCP exchange verified, voice STT plugin loads handler on boot. User can install via /plugin install c3@c3 → /c3-build → /c3-setup → restart → attach in any project directory.
loop_status: All in-scope work done. Plan 7 (Codex) deferred per D010. Karthi-side end-to-end validation against real Telegram bot remains.
